offer: For logistics dispatchers managing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient route planning causes increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries. We provide fleet optimization software instead of manual route planning and performance tracking.
problem: Inefficient route planning leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics dispatchers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics tools
DM logistics dispatchers with demo video outreach
Share insights in community forums for dispatchers
try_it: Let users try Route planning tool and Driver performance monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
